HomePage.welcome_message: UNLEASH YOUR ACADEMIC POTENTIAL. SHARE, DISCOVER, MASTER.
HomePage.sub_message: The definitive resource hub for university students. Find the files you need, share what you know.

MenuPage.welcome_message_description: Dive into an extensive archive of course materials, lecture notes, past exams, and community-driven study guides.
MenuPage.Pasta Perfection: Engineering & Tech: Comprehensive guides and notes for STEM fields.
MenuPage.Sushi Mastery: Business & Economics: Case studies, analytical essays, and market research models.
MenuPage.Smoky BBQ Delights: Arts & Humanities: Literature, historical chronicles, and philosophical treatises.
MenuPage.Hearty Veggie Bowl: Medical & Life Sciences: Detailed anatomical charts, biology notes, and clinical reviews.
MenuPage.Mediterranean Quinoa Salad: Social Sciences: Psychology research, sociology studies, and political science debates.
MenuPage.Crunchy Thai Salad: Law & Jurisprudence: Case briefs, legislative drafts, and legal frameworks.

LoginPage.title3: Less than a minute to infinite resources.
